Dialog.name: MSG_000_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}Whew! Now that's what I'm talkin' about![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}Well, was I right, or was I right? The soup here tastes great, doesn't it?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_000_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}They've gotta put some special ingredient in it—something no other ramen shop would ever use.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}{f 4 23 0 101 3 25 25}Maybe there's a secret clue in the shop's name...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}I always geek out a little whenever I eat here.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}You do? Really? You taste the magic, too?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}Man, wasn't expecting that. I think I'm liking you more by the minute.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}Ah, yeah man, you're right. The noodles'll get soggy if we talk too long.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}It's just... the way you're savoring your soup, it seems like you really appreciate its flavor.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}By the way, I hear you and Takeba-san are pretty close.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}Damn, and you just transferred here, too![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}Well, I can't blame you. A man's gotta be aggressive in this day and age.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}{f 4 23 0 101 0 25 25}Hey, let's hang out after school again sometime. Lemme know when you're free.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}{f 4 23 0 101 1 25 25}I'll tell you all about my secret plan. Dude, you're gonna flip when you hear it![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Kenji Tomochika seems to[n]have taken a liking to me.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A voice is ringing inside my head...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}DEV: Unused label.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}What, it's already dark? Damn, I missed my favorite show![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}Ah, but first, let's swap numbers. Bust out that cell phone![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_008_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}DEV: Unused label.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I decided to return to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}
